clue: Play sweeping chords as holy person meets spirit
explanation: ST (holy person) meets RUM (spirit). To STRUM is to make a sweeping action over several strings to generate sound.
hints: The wordplay is "holy person meets spirit".
We need a short construction that can represent a holy person, and a short word for a kind of spirit.
If we've done the right thing with the wordplay, our answer will be a word that can mean "play sweeping chords".
